paper.title: New Credit Facility Enhances Financial Flexibility
paper.abstract: In addition to securing $6.6 billion in new funding from leading investors, we have established a new $4 billion credit facility with leading banks, including JPMorgan Chase, Citi, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, Santander, Wells Fargo, SMBC, UBS, and HSBC.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
